audience: Sneaker enthusiasts and style-conscious athletes who want premium lifestyle footwear
creative_direction: Air Jordan 4 Retro Frozen Moments. Keep the shoe in the exact pose from the official product photo. Only change the background: float it over textured concrete with cool grey studio light and a soft ground shadow. Then zoom that locked hero out hard for crop headroom. Colorway and logo fidelity mandatory: light grey suede, sail midsole, metallic chrome wings/eyelets, netting, Jumpman tongue and heel marks exact. No baked-in campaign typography.

products.name: Frozen Moments Hero
products.asset_hint: Image 1 is the official product photo: LOCK this exact shoe pose, angle, and silhouette. Do not re-pose the shoe. Only replace the background so it floats over textured concrete with cool grey light and a soft shadow. Image 2 is the approved floating-concrete style reference for environment mood only. Images 3+ are more official product photos for materials and logos (Jumpman, Flight tag, chrome wings, suede, sail midsole). Keep logos sharp and exact. No campaign text.
products.notes: Pose from product photo; composition-ref is background style only.

products.name: Worn in the City
products.asset_hint: Official Frozen Moments product refs. Lifestyle wear shot with exact shoe materials/logos. No text.
